Name: TickTick Focus
Description: Control and mirror your TickTick focus/pomodoro from a single smart button. Start a 25-minute focus, pause/resume with the same click, and start the 5-minute break when focus ends. Detects focus started or paused on another device and shows the live remaining time (MM:SS) on your Ulanzi Deck.
Author: Narlei Moreira

Actions.Name: Focus
Actions.Tooltip: Start, pause, resume and mirror your TickTick focus timer.
